seoTitle: Fingal Head vs Finley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fingal Head and Finley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fingal Head vs Finley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fingal Head and Finley.
heading: Fingal Head vs Finley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fingal Head, New South Wales and Finley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Finley has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Fingal Head (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fingal Head or Finley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fingal Head has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Finley scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fingal Head scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Finley scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fingal Head or Finley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Finley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
